# unity3d-mcp ‚Äî Full Reference

## Architecture

FastMCP 3.2 server with dual execution modes. Hands-In mode connects to a running Unity Editor via MCPBridge.cs (TCP port 10835) for live scene manipulation, play-mode control, and viewport captures. Hands-Off mode uses UnityPy (disk-level) for headless imports and batch builds (`-batchmode -quit`).

### Component Managers

- **UnityEditorManager** ‚Äî Launch, locate, and control Unity Editor instances
- **ProjectManager** ‚Äî Create, open, configure Unity projects
- **SceneManager** ‚Äî Scene CRUD, GameObject hierarchy, transforms
- **VRMAvatarManager** ‚Äî VRM import, humanoid rigging, blend shapes
- **AnimationManager** ‚Äî Animation clips, controllers, state machines
- **AssetManager** ‚Äî Package import, texture optimization, asset organization
- **MaterialManager** ‚Äî Material creation, conversion (built-in ‚Üî URP ‚Üî HDRP)
- **BuildManager** ‚Äî Platform builds, preset management, batch mode
- **PlatformManager** ‚Äî Multi-platform social VR (VRChat, CVR, Resonite, Cluster)
- **VRChatSDKManager** ‚Äî VRChat SDK ops, avatar upload, 2FA/TOTP auth

### Observability

- Prometheus metrics on port 9092 (`/metrics`)
- JSON structured logging (UNITY3D_MCP_LOG_FORMAT=json)
- Docker Compose monitoring stack (Prometheus, Grafana, Loki)

## Tools ‚Äî Full Reference

### unity_bridge (Dual Mode)

| Operation | Description |
|-----------|-------------|
| `status` | Bridge connectivity and effective mode |
| `set_execution_mode` | Persist auto/hands_in/hands_off |
| `ensure_gui` | Start/connect Unity Editor bridge |
| `list_objects` | Object tree for active document |
| `screenshot_view` | Capture viewport PNG |
| `execute_script` | Run C# in live Editor context |

### unity_core

| Operation | Description |
|-----------|-------------|
| `project_create` | New Unity project with template |
| `project_open` | Open existing project |
| `project_list` | List recent projects |
| `editor_launch` | Launch Unity Editor |
| `editor_quit` | Quit Unity Editor |

### unity_scene

| Operation | Description |
|-----------|-------------|
| `create` | New scene |
| `info` | Scene metadata |
| `list_objects` | All GameObjects |
| `create_object` | Instantiate primitive/prefab |
| `delete_object` | Remove GameObject |
| `set_transform` | Set position/rotation/scale |

### unity_render

| Operation | Description |
|-----------|-------------|
| `capture` | Single viewport capture |
| `multi_angle` | Multiple camera angles |
| `scene_summary` | Text summary of scene contents |

### unity_avatar

| Operation | Description |
|-----------|-------------|
| `import_vrm` | Import VRM avatar |
| `setup_rigging` | Configure humanoid rig |
| `optimize` | Polygon reduction, texture compression |
| `build_vrc_package` | Build VRChat avatar upload package |

### unity_build

| Operation | Description |
|-----------|-------------|
| `build` | Build project for target platform |
| `list_presets` | Available build presets |
| `job_status` | Monitor async build progress |

### unity_api (Advanced Editor API)

- `api_execute_method` ‚Äî Execute Unity C# method with complex parameters
- `api_get_scene_objects` ‚Äî Full scene object list with components
- `api_modify_object` ‚Äî Transform/component property modification
- `api_create_prefab` ‚Äî Create prefab asset from scene object
- `api_run_simulation` ‚Äî Physics simulation with data recording
- `api_batch_operations` ‚Äî Batch multiple operations atomically
- `api_move_along_path` ‚Äî Path animation (straight/bezier/spline/catmull_rom)
- `api_create_path_visualization` ‚Äî Line/waypoint path visualization
- `api_follow_path_2d` ‚Äî 2D path with rotation look-ahead
- `api_follow_path_3d` ‚Äî 3D path with banking angles
- `api_stop_path_movement` ‚Äî Stop with optional deceleration

Note: API tools are currently scaffolded as "not yet implemented" ‚Äî they require Unity Editor plugin development.

### Platform Tools

- `list_vr_platforms` ‚Äî VRChat, CVR, Resonite, Cluster info
- `check_platform_sdk` ‚Äî SDK presence check by platform
- `check_cck_installed` / `setup_cvr_avatar` / `validate_for_chilloutvr` ‚Äî CVR flow
- `prepare_for_resonite` / `check_resonite_compatibility` ‚Äî Resonite flow
- `check_cluster_kit` / `prepare_for_cluster` ‚Äî Cluster flow

### worldlabs

| Operation | Description |
|-----------|-------------|
| `import_marble` | Import Marble 3D world into Unity |
| `assemble_review` | AI-driven review loop for imported worlds |

## Config

### Env Vars
- `UNITY_EDITOR_PATH` ‚Äî Path to Unity Editor executable
- `UNITY_PROJECT_PATH` ‚Äî Default Unity project directory
- `UNITY3D_MCP_LOG_FORMAT` ‚Äî "json" for structured logging
- `UNITY3D_MCP_START_METRICS_SERVER` ‚Äî Enable Prometheus (default true)
- `MCP_BRIDGE_URLS` ‚Äî Comma-separated peer MCP server URLs

### Ports
- 10831 ‚Äî Backend (REST + MCP SSE)
- 10830 ‚Äî Frontend (Vite dev dashboard)
- 10835 ‚Äî MCPBridge.cs TCP (Unity Editor plugin)
- 9092 ‚Äî Prometheus metrics

## Error Handling

All tools return `{"success": bool, "data": {...}}`. Bridge tools return clear errors when no Unity Editor is connected. API tools return `{"success": false, "error": "Unity Editor API not yet implemented"}` when using scaffolded operations.

## Cross-repo Integration

- **blender-mcp** ‚Äî GLB/VRM export ‚Üí unity_import import_blender
- **worldlabs-mcp** ‚Äî Marble worlds ‚Üí worldlabs import
- **robotics-mcp** ‚Äî Vbot spawning in Unity scenes
- **osc-mcp** ‚Äî VRChat OSC parameter control (moved to separate server)
